_comment: The trigger window. A narrative timeline, not a chart. danger_window drives the crimson band shaded across every time-series on the page.

phases.title: Presidential-cycle weakness
phases.body: Historically the weakest stretch of the four-year cycle. The seasonal wind turns against the market just as valuations sit at record highs.

phases.title: Mid-term election uncertainty
phases.body: Policy and tax uncertainty around the mid-terms adds noise, and institutions tend to de-risk into anything they can't predict.

phases.title: IPO lock-up expirations
phases.body: The trigger. Lock-ups expire on a wave of mega-IPOs (SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic), releasing trillions in insider shares to sell. Liquidity drains out of an already overstretched market. This is where the music stops.
